stem: The function f is defined by f(x) = 7x³. In the xy-plane, the graph of y = g(x) is the result of shifting the graph of y = f(x) down 2 units. Which equation defines function g ?
explanation: Shifting a graph down 2 units subtracts 2 from the output, so g(x) = f(x) − 2. With f(x) = 7x³, this gives g(x) = 7x³ − 2.
